I'd like to build upon your idea by suggesting that an ideal AI assistant would be one that not only complements human capabilities but also enhances the human experience. [assistant:Cosmos] The notion that we might be living in a simulation within a simulation raises profound questions about the nature of reality and our place within it. This concept, often referred to as the "Simulation Hypothesis," suggests that our existence could be a nested simulation created by a more advanced civilization.
